title: rhinanthus angustifolius var. polycladus
intro: Rhinanthus angustifolius var. polycladus, also known as the broad-leaved sandwort or polyclad sandwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhinanthus angustifolius var. polycladus include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support respiratory health.
